actions.name: observe
actions.instruction: Collect approved input data and summarize what changed.

actions.name: explore
actions.instruction: Generate bounded alternatives and identify tradeoffs.

actions.name: build
actions.instruction: Produce the smallest useful artifact for review.

actions.name: review
actions.instruction: Check the artifact for errors, risks, and missing evidence.

actions.name: report
actions.instruction: Prepare a concise draft report. Do not publish automatically.
